leadText: The Ring Target (Japanese: ねらいのまと Aim Target) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V. It removes the holder's type immunities to moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The holder loses its type immunities to attacking moves. It does not affect other type-based immunities, such as Grass-type Pokémon being immune to powder and spore moves , but does make Ground-type Pokémon vulnerable to Thunder Wave . Flying-type Pokémon become vulnerable to Ground-type moves, but are otherwise considered ungrounded .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W B2 W2 Opelucid City X Y OR AS Battle Maison (32 BP ) S M US UM Battle Tree (16 BP ) Sw Sh Stow-on-Side (bargain shop) Sw Sh IA Cram-o-matic ( Ghost : 32-40 points) S V Delibird Presents ( Levincia Branch, after completing the main storyline)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 Moves that would otherwise have no effect will land on the Pokémon that holds it. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. Moves that normally have no effect will land on a Pokémon holding it. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. Moves that would normally have no effect due to type matchups will still hit the holder.
